description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange city bus with a boxy, utilitarian design and a flat front. The bus features large rectangular windows along both sides, separated by vertical pillars, and two prominent passenger doors on the right side. The roof is equipped with several rectangular ventilation panels and a raised section, while the rear and front both have wide windows for visibility. The bus rides on two axles with four wheels, and the front displays a route sign above the windshield. Details such as side mirrors, a front bumper, and a rear engine compartment are visible, along with a trolley pole on the roof, suggesting it is a trolleybus. The exterior is primarily orange with black and gray accents, and the overall appearance is clean and modern.
description: A medium-sized orange city trolleybus with large side windows, two passenger doors, and a trolley pole on the roof. The bus has a flat front, black and gray accents, and a utilitarian urban design.
description_view_0: Side and top view showing the orange body, large side windows, two passenger doors, and the trolley pole on the roof.
description_view_1: Front and top view highlighting the flat windshield, route sign, and the arrangement of roof panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side and top view displaying the window arrangement, rear wheel, and the trolley pole extending from the roof.
description_view_3: Rear and top view showing the back window, taillights, and the overall boxy shape of the bus.
attribute_window_arrangement: Six large rectangular windows per side, evenly spaced and separated by vertical pillars, with a smaller window at the rear and a window in each door.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: A circular logo with the text 'CITY' is visible on the side near the front door.
